Video.summary: Roddy McDowell plays a filmmaker in an operating room, and meets Carol. Also: a shift with Mrs. Wiggins.
Video.title: Roddy McDowell

Video.summary: Carl Reiner and Melba Moore guest star on this episode.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Carl Reiner, Melba Moore

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters & Tim Conway star in "As The Stomach Turns" spoofing "The Exorcist" in the process.
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Tim Conway

Video.summary: The one-of-a-kind Dom DeLuise and the sultry Peggy Lee are Carol's guests for a night of sketches and songs.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Peggy Lee, Dom Deluise

Video.summary: Vicki Lawrence guests with an all-singing, all-dancing number. Then, a spoof of the film "Love Story."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Jim Nabors appears as Carol's season opening guest! Jim plays a neighbor visiting a single woman.
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Steve Martin and Betty White catch a wave in the movie spoof "Beach Blanket Boo-Boo!".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Martin, Betty White

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence stars. Includes a take-off of film noir "Laura." Also: Stella Toddler meets The Oldest Man.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Guest Stars Mel Torme, Nanette Fabray, and Don Rickles pitch in to help tell "The Tin Pan Alley Story".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles

Image.alt: Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles

Video.summary: Who loves ya, Carol? Guest star Telly Savalas, that's who!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Telly Savalas, Smothers Brothers

Video.summary: Guest Jack Weston matches with Carol on a computer date, Carol sings, and Harvey plays Dr. Jekyll.
Video.title: Jack Weston

Video.summary: Tim Conway stars as a German interrogator in WWII. Carol plays a housewife listening to an advice show.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Tim Conway and Steve Lawrence guest star!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Among this evening's sketches: "Th Wonderful World Of Prisons", and Carol as "Mrs. Invisible Man."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Barbara Eden, Jonathan Winters

Video.summary: Joel Grey and Vincent Price play guests at a hotel where Carol is the switchboard operator.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Joel Grey, Vincent Price

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence guests! Includes Mr. Tudball attempting to explain the new intercom to secretary Mrs. Wiggins.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Guest Steve Lawrence appears in a WWII spoof, and Carol sings "You Light Up My Life" while bathing Tim.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Guests James Garner, George Carlin, and Ken Berry join the gang for an evening of can't-miss comedy.
Video.title: James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry

Image.alt: James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Features Harvey as a man faking whiplash. On "The Family", Mama, Ed, and Eunice are invited to Mickey's place.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest stars Steve Lawrence & Sally Struthers join in "Late, Late Movie" spoofs. Also: "The Boring Twenties."
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Sally Struthers

Video.summary: Martha Raye guests as Carol's cabinmate. A "V.I.P." interview with Lynda Bird and a demonstration of E.S.P.
Video.title: Martha Raye

Video.summary: Jonathan Winters crashes Q&A. Sid Caesar teaches Carol self-defense, then joins the gang for a spoof.
Video.title: Jonathan Winters, Sid Caesar

Video.summary: Tim Conway stars! Tim will make you laugh as the World's Oldest Clockmaker, and as Ed's pal in "The Family."
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: John Byner and Petula Clark head downtown to the show.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: John Byner, Petula Clark

Video.summary: Ruth Buzzi & Jack Gilford star in "Snow White- 15 Years Later." An accident causes problems on "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Ruth Buzzi, Jack Gilford

Video.summary: Jack Gilford guests. Gilford plays a man whose life is transformed by a hat and drops in on "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Jack Gilford

Video.summary: Martha Raye and Mel Torme guest star! Martha appears in "The Sunday Painters". Mel and Martha join parodies.
Video.title: Martha Raye, Mel Torme

Video.summary: Michele Lee and Flip Wilson dazzle with song and stand-up comedy, and Carol vamps in "V.I.P." as Mae East.
Video.title: Michele Lee, Flip Wilson

Video.summary: Poetically-named guest stars Martha Raye and Tim Conway come to play.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Martha Raye, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Frank Gorshin and Lana Turner guest. Gorshin does impressions, then joins Turner in a sketch about Bluebeard.
Video.title: Frank Gorshin, Lana Turner

Video.summary: Tim and Carol spar over a call, Tim tries to sell Vicki a vacuum, and the gang performs a musical recital.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Tim Conway & Steve Lawrence guest! A chimp bites Tim in one sketch, while another looks at relationships.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Sid Caesar and Barbara McNair guest. McNair and Carol spoof a series, and "V.I.P." features silent film stars.
Video.title: Barbara McNair, Sid Caesar

Video.summary: Guest Stars Mel Torme, Nanette Fabray, and Don Rickles pitch in to help tell "The Tin Pan Alley Story."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles

Image.alt: Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles

Video.summary: Carl Reiner guests. Featuring WWII film "The Plot To Hurt Hitler." Also: "The Writer" & "Terminal Hospital."
Video.title: Carl Reiner

Video.summary: Harvey leads a "Fireside Chat" with the First Family. Carol interviews Hugh Handsome, and a cameo by Bob Hope!
Video.title: Bob Hope

Video.summary: Don Rickles and Nanette Fabray guest star. Fabray and Carol are expectant mothers, and Rickles is a salesman.
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Don Rickles

Video.summary: Jane Connell and Tim Conway star! Harvey & Tim are tipsy friends coming home. Also: The Arabian Nights spoof.
Video.title: Jane Connell, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Guest Andy Griffith appears in "Mr. Law & Order." On "Carol & Sis", Roger leaves Carol a football widow.
Video.title: Andy Griffith
